Game Summary (Experimental)

You're looking at an experimental feature from AoE4 World, bringing your games’ build history, unit stats and scores to the web. You can scroll through the build history, compare scores and see progression in charts.

  • You can see your own games if you are signed in and play through Steam.
  • You can see ranked and quick match games from anyone who has their Match History set to public in the game.
  • You can share the url of this page with anyone so they can give you feedback.
  • Share any issues or feedback you may have in our discord.
  • Learn more about this feature in our FAQ
